Study Title: Phase IIa Study Evaluating AZD7798 in Crohn's Disease
Brief Summary: This is a randomised, double-blind, parallel group, placebo-controlled Phase IIa study designed to evaluate the efficacy and safety of AZD7798 in participants with moderate to severe Crohn's disease.
